chsc6x_setup.message0: Create touch screen %1 using I2C %2 Address %3 Interrupt pin %4 Width %5 Height %6 Rotation %7
chsc6x_setup.tooltip: Create and initialize the CHSC6X touch screen object

chsc6x_is_pressed.tooltip: Detect whether the touch screen is touched

chsc6x_get_x.tooltip: Get the X coordinate of the touch point

chsc6x_get_y.tooltip: Get the Y coordinate of the touch point

chsc6x_get_xy.message0: Touch screen %1 Get coordinates to X %2 Y %3
chsc6x_get_xy.tooltip: Get the touch coordinates to the specified variable

chsc6x_set_rotation.tooltip: Set the touch screen rotation angle (0-3)

chsc6x_set_screen_size.message0: Touch screen %1 Set screen size Width %2 Height %3

chsc6x_run.tooltip: Run touch detection and update internal coordinates
